name: The Estate Job
description: Worked-example stealth expansion (task 19): a Private Estate night-burglary archetype, three ghost/mule Edges, a Locksmith station, and a near-silent Diamond Snips gadget — all data + scenes, no core code. Proves the drop-in-a-folder loop (FR-19-4). Ships disabled; enable it in the Expansion sandbox or via PackManager.set_enabled.
